title: [BUG] Empty item at start of the Rows while reading excel file
author: alfaz151
body:
[testexceljs.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/13040500/testexceljs.xlsx)
## 🐛 Bug Report

I am trying ti read a excel(.xlsx) file
so i raid it, while getting values of rows there is a <empty items> in start of each row. 
Lib version: latest

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const readWorkbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
await readWorkbook.xlsx.readFile('testexceljs.xlsx')
const readWorksheet = readWorkbook.getWorksheet('TestWorksheet');
expect(readWorksheet.getRow(2).values).to.be.have([1, 'John', 'Doe'])
        ```
        

## The expected behaviour:

i was expecting the row should be [1, 'John', 'Doe'] but the actual value is [<empty item>, 1, 'John', 'Doe']

comments.author: maaaaagda
comments.body: Duplicate of https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/1436. I found what the issue is and commented in there.

comments.author: alfaz151
comments.body:
You can use `row._cells` 
to get the parse row array without any undefined element
